headline: Is It Time To Reassess Gilead Sciences (GILD) After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Gilead Sciences at US$134.36 is still offering value, the starting point is to understand what the current market price is implying about the business. The stock has returned 3.7% over the last 7 days, 1.1% over the last 30 days, 10.5% year to date, 28.5% over 1 year, 92.9% over 3 years and 144.9% over 5 years, which gives useful context for how expectations and perceived risk have shifted over time.
